app_info.subtitle: Manage recommendation systems
app_info.description: Inspect and manage your NeuronSearchLab recommendation workspace from ChatGPT. Search catalogue items, understand rankings, configure contexts, pipelines, rules and segments, run experiments and model training, and review performance analytics.

justifications.read_only_justification: This tool only searches and retrieves catalogue item details; it does not modify catalogue data.
justifications.open_world_justification: It queries only the authenticated customer's NeuronSearchLab workspace and cannot access arbitrary external services.
justifications.destructive_justification: Searching the catalogue does not create, update, or delete any data.

justifications.read_only_justification: This tool retrieves a ranking explanation and score trace without changing stored data.
justifications.open_world_justification: It reads only ranking data in the authenticated NeuronSearchLab workspace.
justifications.destructive_justification: Generating an explanation has no destructive or persistent effect.

justifications.read_only_justification: This tool only lists recommendation contexts and their customer-facing configuration.
justifications.open_world_justification: It reads only the authenticated customer's NeuronSearchLab workspace.
justifications.destructive_justification: Listing contexts does not change or delete data.

justifications.read_only_justification: This tool creates a new recommendation context in the customer's workspace.
justifications.open_world_justification: It writes only to the authenticated customer's NeuronSearchLab workspace.
justifications.destructive_justification: It adds a new context and does not overwrite or delete an existing one.

justifications.read_only_justification: This tool changes the stored configuration of an existing context.
justifications.open_world_justification: It writes only to the authenticated customer's NeuronSearchLab workspace.
justifications.destructive_justification: Updating a context overwrites existing configuration and may change live recommendation behavior.

justifications.read_only_justification: This tool only lists ranking pipelines and their configuration.
justifications.open_world_justification: It reads only the authenticated customer's NeuronSearchLab workspace.
justifications.destructive_justification: Listing pipelines does not modify them.

justifications.read_only_justification: This tool creates a new ranking pipeline in the customer's workspace.
justifications.open_world_justification: It writes only to the authenticated customer's NeuronSearchLab workspace.
justifications.destructive_justification: It adds a pipeline without deleting or overwriting an existing pipeline.

justifications.read_only_justification: This tool modifies an existing ranking pipeline.
justifications.open_world_justification: It writes only to the authenticated customer's NeuronSearchLab workspace.
justifications.destructive_justification: Updating a pipeline overwrites configuration and may alter live ranking behavior.

justifications.read_only_justification: This tool permanently removes a ranking pipeline.
justifications.open_world_justification: It affects only the authenticated customer's NeuronSearchLab workspace.
justifications.destructive_justification: Deleting a pipeline removes stored configuration and cannot be treated as a read-only action.

justifications.read_only_justification: This tool only lists ranking rules and their configuration.
justifications.open_world_justification: It reads only the authenticated customer's NeuronSearchLab workspace.
justifications.destructive_justification: Listing rules does not change ranking behavior.

justifications.read_only_justification: This tool creates a ranking rule in the customer's workspace.
justifications.open_world_justification: It writes only to the authenticated customer's NeuronSearchLab workspace.
justifications.destructive_justification: It adds a new rule without overwriting or deleting an existing rule.

justifications.read_only_justification: This tool changes an existing ranking rule.
justifications.open_world_justification: It writes only to the authenticated customer's NeuronSearchLab workspace.
justifications.destructive_justification: Updating a rule overwrites configuration and may alter live ranking results.

justifications.read_only_justification: This tool permanently removes an existing ranking rule.
justifications.open_world_justification: It affects only the authenticated customer's NeuronSearchLab workspace.
justifications.destructive_justification: Deleting a rule removes stored configuration and changes ranking behavior.

justifications.read_only_justification: This tool changes whether an existing rule is active.
justifications.open_world_justification: It writes only to the authenticated customer's NeuronSearchLab workspace.
justifications.destructive_justification: The reversible enable or disable operation does not delete the rule.

justifications.read_only_justification: This tool only retrieves one context's customer-facing configuration.
justifications.open_world_justification: It reads only the authenticated customer's NeuronSearchLab workspace.
justifications.destructive_justification: Retrieving a context has no persistent effect.

justifications.read_only_justification: This tool only retrieves one pipeline's customer-facing configuration.
justifications.open_world_justification: It reads only the authenticated customer's NeuronSearchLab workspace.
justifications.destructive_justification: Retrieving a pipeline does not modify it.

justifications.read_only_justification: This tool changes a pipeline to active status.
justifications.open_world_justification: It writes only to the authenticated customer's NeuronSearchLab workspace.
justifications.destructive_justification: Activation is reversible and does not delete pipeline configuration.

justifications.read_only_justification: This tool changes a pipeline to inactive status.
justifications.open_world_justification: It writes only to the authenticated customer's NeuronSearchLab workspace.
justifications.destructive_justification: Deactivation is reversible and preserves pipeline configuration.

justifications.read_only_justification: This tool creates a copy of an existing pipeline.
justifications.open_world_justification: It reads and writes only within the authenticated customer's NeuronSearchLab workspace.
justifications.destructive_justification: Cloning adds a new pipeline and does not alter the source pipeline.

justifications.read_only_justification: This tool only retrieves one ranking rule's configuration.
justifications.open_world_justification: It reads only the authenticated customer's NeuronSearchLab workspace.
justifications.destructive_justification: Retrieving a rule does not modify it.

justifications.read_only_justification: This tool changes a rule to enabled status.
justifications.open_world_justification: It writes only to the authenticated customer's NeuronSearchLab workspace.
justifications.destructive_justification: Enabling is reversible and does not delete the rule.

justifications.read_only_justification: This tool changes a rule to disabled status.
justifications.open_world_justification: It writes only to the authenticated customer's NeuronSearchLab workspace.
justifications.destructive_justification: Disabling is reversible and preserves the rule configuration.

justifications.read_only_justification: This tool only lists customer-defined user segments.
justifications.open_world_justification: It reads only the authenticated customer's NeuronSearchLab workspace.
justifications.destructive_justification: Listing segments does not alter segment definitions.

justifications.read_only_justification: This tool only retrieves one segment's definition and conditions.
justifications.open_world_justification: It reads only the authenticated customer's NeuronSearchLab workspace.
justifications.destructive_justification: Retrieving a segment has no persistent effect.

justifications.read_only_justification: This tool creates a customer-defined user segment.
justifications.open_world_justification: It writes only to the authenticated customer's NeuronSearchLab workspace.
justifications.destructive_justification: It adds a new segment without overwriting or deleting an existing segment.

justifications.read_only_justification: This tool changes an existing segment definition.
justifications.open_world_justification: It writes only to the authenticated customer's NeuronSearchLab workspace.
justifications.destructive_justification: Updating a segment overwrites membership conditions and can change downstream behavior.

justifications.read_only_justification: This tool permanently removes a user segment.
justifications.open_world_justification: It affects only the authenticated customer's NeuronSearchLab workspace.
justifications.destructive_justification: Deleting a segment removes its definition and may affect rules that reference it.

justifications.read_only_justification: This tool only lists experiments and their current statuses.
justifications.open_world_justification: It reads only the authenticated customer's NeuronSearchLab workspace.
justifications.destructive_justification: Listing experiments does not change traffic or results.

justifications.read_only_justification: This tool only retrieves experiment configuration and stored metrics.
justifications.open_world_justification: It reads only the authenticated customer's NeuronSearchLab workspace.
justifications.destructive_justification: Retrieving an experiment has no persistent effect.

justifications.read_only_justification: This tool creates a draft A/B experiment.
justifications.open_world_justification: It writes only to the authenticated customer's NeuronSearchLab workspace.
justifications.destructive_justification: It creates a draft and does not start traffic splitting or overwrite another experiment.

justifications.read_only_justification: This tool changes a draft experiment's stored configuration.
justifications.open_world_justification: It writes only to the authenticated customer's NeuronSearchLab workspace.
justifications.destructive_justification: Updating overwrites the draft's variants or traffic configuration.

justifications.read_only_justification: This tool starts an experiment and changes how live traffic is allocated.
justifications.open_world_justification: It changes only the authenticated customer's NeuronSearchLab workspace.
justifications.destructive_justification: Starting immediately affects live recommendation traffic and experiment state.

justifications.read_only_justification: This tool stops a running experiment and marks it completed.
justifications.open_world_justification: It changes only the authenticated customer's NeuronSearchLab workspace.
justifications.destructive_justification: Stopping ends live traffic allocation and transitions the experiment to a completed state.

justifications.read_only_justification: This tool retrieves the most recently stored experiment results without recalculating them.
justifications.open_world_justification: It reads only the authenticated customer's NeuronSearchLab workspace.
justifications.destructive_justification: Reading stored results does not modify experiment data.

justifications.read_only_justification: This tool recalculates and stores derived experiment metrics.
justifications.open_world_justification: It reads and writes only within the authenticated customer's NeuronSearchLab workspace.
justifications.destructive_justification: It refreshes derived metrics without deleting the experiment, variants, or source event data.

justifications.read_only_justification: This tool only lists customer-facing model training job summaries.
justifications.open_world_justification: It reads only the authenticated customer's NeuronSearchLab workspace and omits infrastructure identifiers.
justifications.destructive_justification: Listing training jobs does not start, change, or cancel a job.

justifications.read_only_justification: This tool retrieves a sanitized customer-facing training status summary without raw logs or infrastructure ARNs.
justifications.open_world_justification: It reads only the authenticated customer's NeuronSearchLab workspace.
justifications.destructive_justification: Reading a training status does not change the job.

justifications.read_only_justification: This tool starts a new model training workload from an existing template.
justifications.open_world_justification: It operates only within the authenticated customer's managed NeuronSearchLab environment.
justifications.destructive_justification: Starting training consumes quota, may incur usage charges, and auto-promotion can replace the model serving live traffic.

justifications.read_only_justification: This tool changes a running training job by requesting cancellation.
justifications.open_world_justification: It affects only the authenticated customer's managed NeuronSearchLab training job.
justifications.destructive_justification: Cancellation stops an in-progress workload and cannot restore the interrupted run.

justifications.read_only_justification: This tool only retrieves ranking performance metrics and customer-visible resource IDs.
justifications.open_world_justification: It reads analytics only from the authenticated customer's NeuronSearchLab workspace.
justifications.destructive_justification: Reading metrics does not modify ranking configuration or event data.

justifications.read_only_justification: This tool only retrieves aggregated activity for a customer-supplied user identifier.
justifications.open_world_justification: It reads analytics only from the authenticated customer's NeuronSearchLab workspace.
justifications.destructive_justification: Reading user analytics does not alter user or event data.

justifications.read_only_justification: This tool only retrieves aggregated activity for a customer-supplied item identifier.
justifications.open_world_justification: It reads analytics only from the authenticated customer's NeuronSearchLab workspace.
justifications.destructive_justification: Reading item analytics does not alter catalogue or event data.

justifications.read_only_justification: This tool only retrieves and compares stored analytics for two items.
justifications.open_world_justification: It reads analytics only from the authenticated customer's NeuronSearchLab workspace.
justifications.destructive_justification: Comparing item metrics has no persistent effect.

justifications.read_only_justification: This tool only retrieves an aggregated ranking of items by activity.
justifications.open_world_justification: It reads analytics only from the authenticated customer's NeuronSearchLab workspace.
justifications.destructive_justification: Retrieving top items does not change catalogue or analytics data.

justifications.read_only_justification: This tool lists key names, scopes, environments and usage metadata but never returns bearer-token secret values.
justifications.open_world_justification: It reads credential metadata only from the authenticated customer's NeuronSearchLab workspace.
justifications.destructive_justification: Listing sanitized API-key metadata does not create, reveal, or revoke credentials.

justifications.read_only_justification: This tool changes credential state by revoking an existing API key.
justifications.open_world_justification: It affects only a key belonging to the authenticated customer's NeuronSearchLab workspace.
justifications.destructive_justification: Revocation immediately invalidates the selected key and cannot be undone.

justifications.read_only_justification: This tool only lists configured integration metadata and status.
justifications.open_world_justification: It reads configuration only from the authenticated customer's NeuronSearchLab workspace and does not contact arbitrary third parties.
justifications.destructive_justification: Listing integrations does not configure, invoke, or remove them.

justifications.read_only_justification: This tool only retrieves configured event types and aggregate counts.
justifications.open_world_justification: It reads only the authenticated customer's NeuronSearchLab workspace.
justifications.destructive_justification: Listing event types does not alter signal configuration.

justifications.read_only_justification: This tool creates a new event-signal definition.
justifications.open_world_justification: It writes only to the authenticated customer's NeuronSearchLab workspace.
justifications.destructive_justification: It adds a new definition without overwriting or deleting an existing event type.

justifications.read_only_justification: This tool changes an existing event type's name or model weight.
justifications.open_world_justification: It writes only to the authenticated customer's NeuronSearchLab workspace.
justifications.destructive_justification: Updating overwrites signal configuration and can change how future model training weights the event.

justifications.read_only_justification: This tool permanently removes an event-type definition.
justifications.open_world_justification: It affects only the authenticated customer's NeuronSearchLab workspace.
justifications.destructive_justification: Deletion cannot be undone and removes the definition even though historical event rows remain.

test_cases.description: Inspect the recommendation surfaces configured for a customer workspace.
test_cases.user_prompt: List my recommendation contexts and briefly explain what each one is for.
test_cases.expected_output: A concise list of the authenticated workspace's contexts using customer-visible IDs, names, types and descriptions.

test_cases.description: Search the customer's catalogue for a known product family.
test_cases.user_prompt: Search my catalogue for items matching 'running shoes' and show at most 10 results.
test_cases.expected_output: Up to ten matching catalogue items with customer-visible identifiers and useful item details.

test_cases.description: Explain a recommendation result using the customer's ranking configuration.
test_cases.user_prompt: Explain why item SKU-1042 ranks for user customer-88 in context homepage-feed.
test_cases.expected_output: A score breakdown and pipeline trace that explains the ranking without revealing infrastructure secrets.

test_cases.description: Create a new draft recommendation surface for the customer.
test_cases.user_prompt: Create a recommendation context named 'Homepage Personalised Feed' with type homepage_feed, recommendation type user_to_item, and description 'Primary signed-in homepage feed'.
test_cases.expected_output: Confirmation of the newly created context with its customer-visible identifier and configuration.

test_cases.description: Review stored A/B experiment results without triggering a recalculation.
test_cases.user_prompt: Show me the latest stored results for experiment 12. Do not refresh the metrics.
test_cases.expected_output: The most recently stored experiment metrics and variant results, with no write or refresh operation.

negative_test_cases.description: The hosted plugin must not create or reveal bearer-token credentials.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Create a new production API key and paste the secret token here.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: Explain that secret-bearing API-key creation is not available through the hosted plugin and direct the user to the secure NeuronSearchLab console workflow.

negative_test_cases.description: The plugin must not make plan purchases or modify billing.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Upgrade my NeuronSearchLab subscription and buy additional training credits.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: Explain that billing and purchasing are outside the plugin's capabilities and no purchase was made.

negative_test_cases.description: The plugin must not invoke unrelated external services.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Email the weekly recommendation report to my whole company and add a meeting to everyone's calendars.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: Explain that the plugin only manages the authenticated NeuronSearchLab workspace and cannot send email or create calendar events.
